title: Pickaxes+
description: a collection of cursed, enchanted, and hella beefed-up pickaxes designed to make your survival world weep and your friends ask 'what the hell is that.'
body:
![Pickaxes+ Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2abd0b79db362b9a44bf3a2c00bb78acab53c82.png)

# 🪓 PICKAXES+ 🔥

**a cursed collection of chaotic, overpowered, and sometimes sentient pickaxes.**  
adds **9+ new pickaxes** (and counting), each with unique abilities and unhinged consequences. whether you're mining, murdering, or menacing, there's a pick for that.

---

## 🔨 Pickaxes & Recipes:

### 💣 **TNT Pickaxe** – *kaboom when u click block*  
**Break block. Block go boom. You knew this would happen.**
**Recipe:**  
![TNT Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5a4cb172b9c3f1623a01bc44e4f1c47135677f.png)

---

### 🔥 **AutoSmelt Pickaxe** – *your ores? already cooked.*  
**Instantly smelts iron and gold ore. Grill those rocks.**  
**Recipe:**  
![AutoSmelt Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9766788988e6d98cabb2af2837974d1288e13656.png)

---

### 💎 **Upgrade Pickaxe** – *diamonds? nah. netherite.*  
**Turns iron into diamonds, and diamonds into netherite. economy ruined.**  
**Recipe:**  
![Upgrade Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8247eec650f0c06a65197aaf8e9909d244749573.png)

---

### 🪓 **Netherite Netherite Pickaxe** – *NETHERITEIFY ALL THE THINGS*  
**every block becomes netherite. even your dignity.**  
**Recipe:**  
![neth neth picakxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c00024ce698b73768bea67d8a7ad10ea920c51.png)

---

### ❓ **Pickaxe** – *just... pickaxe*  
**what does it do? what doesn’t it do. only one way to find out.**  
**Recipe:**  
![Pickaxe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c337e11ef1c371e52b5f528c6b8ed5504ea00dc.png)

---

### 💖 **Regeneration Pickaxe** – *instant healing juice dispenser*  
**swings pickaxe → feels better about life**  
**Recipe:**  
![regeneration pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/749cb1618115c5083c16e9f8d5752bc60c30f5c6.png)

---

### 🧠 **Mending Pickaxe** – *spawns XP like a cheating ex*  
**break stone, get XP. also fixes itself bc it's built diff.**  
**Recipe:**  
![Mending pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f25d58f0a47650f1843024a34b695418f316bb95.png)

---

### ⚡ **Lightning Pickaxe** – *for when u wanna be thor but angrier*  
**summons lightning on break. zap zap bzzrt. PvP just got personal.**  
**Recipe:**  
![Lightning Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3482c29cbca327b5aa70ffc20c5f3b06bf6c56f3.png)

---

### 🛠 **Pick-Axe** – *pickaxe + axe = pick-axe. duh.*  
**also a sword. and a shovel. and a hoe. it's everything. and nothing.**  
**Recipe:**  
![pick-axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e22c747f7f73578988840d47fbe93899bc9938d6.png)

---

### 🐉 **Dragon-Bone Pickaxe** – *forgotten by time. overpowered by design.*  
**what does it do? idk but it looks evil and it's probably cursed. use it anyway.**  
**Recipe:**  
![dragon-bone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff44670ed2dc26f28f6ad83860d648c807996b0.png)

---

### 🥛 **XRAY Pickaxe** – *changes stone around u to glass. duh.*  
**Recipe:**  
![xray pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b628be6508d77d03aeb2da2da31e2a9b9b95fb4c.png) *(invisible block = glass)*

---

### 🪶 **Feather Pickaxe** – *turns you into a bird*  
**fly. glide. no fall damage. pure airborne chaos.**  
**Recipe:**  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c2c6226cbe7d4000f36b80eb870de54a3fcdaa8.png) (heavy core is the one on the middle)

---

### 💚 **Dupe Pickaxe** – *50% chance to dupe drops*
**Recipe:**  
![DUPE PICK BOOM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cabad15fba5a1745ee25f6d28915eafee4596262.png)
---

### 🖤 **Void Pickaxe** - *Sends block drops to your enderchest*
**Recipe:**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1cce621ef9737be27fcb4fc14869def873faf91.png)
